query: SELECT s.id, s.name, COUNT(l.id) as leadCount FROM sellers s LEFT JOIN crm_leads l ON l.sellerId = s.id AND l.archived = 0 WHERE s.department = 'vendas' AND s.active = 1 AND s.sellerRole = 'vendedor' AND s.id != 90001 GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY leadCount ASC, s.id ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 72z9zwCQQTtJjjC.7f634d589b23 --database NKs9YYU4Bt79zUwnWH56wx --execute SELECT s.id, s.name, COUNT(l.id) as leadCount FROM sellers s LEFT JOIN crm_leads l ON l.sellerId = s.id AND l.archived = 0 WHERE s.department = 'vendas' AND s.active = 1 AND s.sellerRole = 'vendedor' AND s.id != 90001 GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY leadCount ASC, s.id ASC;
